title: Is this real Geofront Art from Q
display_title: Is this real Geofront Art from Q
wikitext:
[]: Is this real? (Geofront Art from Q)             Quote Post by andreh » Tue May 20, 2014 5:28 pm I found this image randomly on the internet but I could not tell whether it is fake or real. We have a Geofront diagram in 3.0 and Kaworu with EVA13's "ceramic wings": SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Is this real?             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue May 20, 2014 5:58 pm andreh wrote: Official material or just a fanart?

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Tue May 20, 2014 6:06 pm ^ Oh my God for a minute there on the web page I thought they were talking about the Adam Kadmon, I'm all like "WTF has Adam Kadmon got to do with Jewish Mysticism?".

[]: Re: Is this real?             Quote Post by andreh » Tue May 20, 2014 10:46 pm Ornette wrote: It's all in English, looks like fan art. Looks to have maybe come from here .
